rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Creating a new utility function without wiring it into the consuming code makes it dead code. The verifyPasswordHash utility existed but AuthService never called it, breaking the acceptance criterion.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Payload hidden fields use both `hidden: true` AND `access: { read: () => false, update: () => false }` together — one is not enough.","scope":"src/server/payload"},{"kind":"convention","text":"PBKDF2 config in this codebase: crypto.pbkdf2(password, salt, 25000, 512, 'sha256', callback) — iterations=25000, keylen=512.","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When adding a new field that must be used at runtime, verify it is consumed by existing code paths, not just added to the schema.","scope":"auth"}]}
